Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction technology features, and active promotions to source email content.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket category, and contact history.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classification label and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support context inside HubSpot, giving agents a single workspace with AI-assisted replies ready to go, improving team efficiency and response consistency.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when DFC customers show browsing or engagement activity on the R1 Concepts website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development with connections and functionality not yet defined.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and summarizes discovered creator profiles using AI to assess niche relevance, audience fit, and content quality signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters and prioritizes the best-fit creators automatically, reducing the manual review burden and ensuring only high-potential prospects move forward.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche alignment, follower quality, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Delivers a ranked list of creator candidates based on configurable business priorities, enabling faster and more objective partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator lists and previously learned outreach sequences stored in Drive documents.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach is targeted and consistent by pulling pre-vetted creator data and proven messaging frameworks instantly.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator using learned prompts and sequence logic.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to each qualified creator on the list.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads historical influencer email conversation logs and negotiation outcomes to train response context.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up response.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-generated negotiation response back to the creator.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify in-stock qualifying products.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-informed prompts.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes it as a formatted post with SEO metadata, categories, and tags applied.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Puppeteer scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references and Bing Images plus Wikimedia Commons for vehicle-specific photos to use in the thumbnail and video assembly.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Claude receives the vehicle input and scraped reference data, then generates a complete Friction Friday-style video script tailored to that vehicle's brake system, tone, and format.

Friction Friday Automation.action: ElevenLabs converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using the designated Friction Friday voice profile.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a studio-quality narration track instantly, removing the need for recording sessions, retakes, or external voice talent coordination.

Friction Friday Automation.action: An Apps Script webhook assembles all outputs — script text, voiceover file link, thumbnail image, and video package — and logs them into a structured Sheets row for review or publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a complete, organized video production package in one place, allowing the team to review or publish without hunting across tools or folders.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows, identifying site visit triggers, welcome series logic, enrollment criteria, and action sequences.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and index coverage data for all DFC blog URLs.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are visited and passes behavioral signals to HubSpot via API.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the automation pipeline to begin processing.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project tasks, statuses, and deadlines across assigned Asana workspaces to identify updates or blockers.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as the source input for task extraction.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data and ad copy from all active search campaigns, identifying underperforming ads based on CTR, conversion rate, or quality score thresholds.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent names, statuses, owners, progress notes, and last-updated timestamps.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Claude cross-references the Dream inventory results against expected parts for that vehicle to identify gaps — parts DFC should carry but currently does not stock.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Automatically flags inventory gaps that would otherwise require manual comparison, giving Mark a complete picture of both coverage and missing opportunities.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark a formatted Excel catalog file showing what DFC stocks for the requested vehicles and a clearly marked list of what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a ready-to-use catalog in minutes instead of hours, letting Mark move straight to customer conversations or purchasing decisions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, capturing on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving significant labor hours every week and eliminating version-control issues.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live Dream status for each line item and flags any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — marking them as dead-end.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report that distinguishes resolvable backorders from true dead-ends, allowing faster prioritization and customer response.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder lines, pre-written with the relevant part status and estimated resolution details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Saves reps from writing repetitive status emails from scratch and ensures customers receive consistent, accurate updates faster than the current manual process allows.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually across three separate vendor catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify which fitments DFC already covers and which represent gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where it is missing market opportunities, providing a clear foundation for product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about their demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments that DFC does not currently carry.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from actual buyers to validate product expansion decisions before investing in new inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitments, DFC cross-reference results, gap analysis, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers one clean, decision-ready document that eliminates the need for Dino to reconcile data from multiple sources manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, body text, descriptions, and CTAs — for specific flagged phrases defined by the user.
Meta Investigation.impact: Audits every live ad instantly on demand rather than requiring someone to manually open and read through each ad in multiple ad managers.

Meta Investigation.action: Claude reviews the collected ad copy, identifies every instance of the flagged phrases, and formats a structured list noting the exact ad, field, and matched text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Ensures no match is missed and produces a precise, easy-to-act-on flagged list rather than a raw data dump.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the flagged results as a formatted report showing each matched ad with the specific field and exact copy where the phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Gets compliance or creative findings to the right person immediately so corrective action can be taken on live ads without delay.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the candidate's email, name, and any attached resume PDF.
Resume Bot.impact: Catches every inbound application automatically so no candidate falls through the cracks during high-volume hiring periods.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each extracted resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and date for persistent record-keeping.
Resume Bot.impact: Maintains a clean, searchable archive of all applicant files without anyone manually downloading and filing attachments.

Resume Bot.action: Claude scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, classifies the candidate as approved, denied, or paused, and generates an appropriate auto-reply for denied or no-resume submissions.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates hours of initial resume screening per week and ensures every candidate gets a timely, consistent response regardless of hiring team availability.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate decision to a dashboard with columns for name, role, score, decision, and reply status — with paused candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of all applicants and ensures paused candidates are never forgotten when a role reopens.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now spanning 56 total agents — 28 Completed, 10 In Progress, and 18 Planned. This week we welcomed one new addition: the **Resume Bot**, a daily agent that reads incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scores candidates against open roles using Claude, files PDFs in Drive, sends auto-replies, and logs all decisions to a Sheets dashboard. No agents changed stages this week, but the pipeline remains active and well-stocked with meaningful work ahead. Great momentum across the board — let's keep it rolling!
